prompt: Dark-themed code editor with vibrant syntax highlighting in electric blues and greens, floating autocomplete suggestions, terminal-style interface with glowing cursor and Matrix-inspired visual effects
prompt_refined: A full-screen view of a dark-themed code editor, featuring vibrant syntax highlighting in electric blues and greens. The interface is styled like a traditional terminal, with a prominently glowing text cursor. Multiple lines of translucent, floating autocomplete suggestions are displayed directly beneath the active coding line. Subtle Matrix-inspired green digital rain cascades vertically in the background and along the edges of the screen.
objects: Vibrant syntax highlighting (electric blues and greens)
Multiple lines of translucent, floating autocomplete suggestions (beneath active coding line)
Subtle Matrix-inspired green digital rain (in background and along edges)
